title: Umbrella: RunPod-branch backlog (Clusters A/B/C) â€” coordination plan
description:
UMBRELLA / coordination card for the RunPod-branch backlog. Groups the in-scope To Do cards into 3 dependency-ordered clusters, run cluster-by-cluster in focused sessions chained with mpi-handoff. Plan + file-level conflict matrix live in this card's plan.md.

CLUSTER A (Pod v0.9.0/v0.10.0 batch, ACTIVE): MPI-139 â†’ MPI-149 â†’ MPI-145 â†’ MPI-146 â†’ MPI-148.
CLUSTER B (remote download stack): MPI-129 â†’ MPI-140 â†’ MPI-136 â†’ MPI-135.
CLUSTER C (LTX authoring polish): MPI-128 â†’ MPI-147.

KEY CONFLICTS (see plan.md matrix): A must fully ship+commit before B (share downloadManager.js + wrapper.py + dependencies.js + remoteProxy.js). MPI-149 blocks the v0.26 floor. MPI-129 is upstream of 140/136. C is independent (parallelizable with a dedicated agent).

OUT OF SCOPE (removed by user 2026-06-26): MPI-71, MPI-69, MPI-126, MPI-137 (still on board, not in this umbrella).

This card is a tracker, not implementation work â€” it stays in todo as the map; the member cards do the work. v0.26 floor verified locally 2026-06-26 (i2v + audio + Wan all gen clean on RTX 4060 Ti).
